headline: Here’s Why Delta Air Lines (DAL) is Among the 10 Most Undervalued American Stocks to Invest In
summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued American Stocks to Invest In. On June 30, 2026, Wells Fargo raised its price target on Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) to $105 from $75 and kept an Overweight rating. Wells Fargo raised its estimates and price targets as fuel falls and demand […]

headline: Higher Airfares Are Sticking After Spring Price Hikes, Analyst Says
summary: BofA turns bullish on U.S. airlines ahead of Q2 earnings, raising price targets on strong demand and stable summer fares. Read more.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Delta Air Lines, Raises Price Target to $100
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Andrew Didora   maintains Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $93 to $100.
